truth_io.title: Bulk Import / Export Truth Labels
truth_io.export_help_html: Export the {count} currently registered label(s) as CSV or JSON. Useful for backup or sharing while the backend is not yet ready.
truth_io.import_help: Upload a CSV or JSON file, or paste the text. The format is validated and you can review it in the preview before registering.
truth_io.no_valid_items: There are no valid items to import.

truth.title: Label Truth Candidate Files
truth.help_html:
Enter the paths of the files that should actually implement this artifact.
The registered file set is compared with the files the AI actually matched to compute precision/recall.
truth.matched_ref_label: Current AI matches ({count}) — click to add to truth set
truth.input_placeholder: Type a path like src/auth/UserService.ts and press Enter
truth.empty: Please add truth files. Click an AI match above or enter one directly.
truth.path_already_added: This path has already been added.
truth.delete_confirm_message: Delete the truth label for this artifact?

coverage.title: Generate Coverage Badge
coverage.help: shields.io-compatible badges — paste into your README to show project status at a glance.
coverage.set_title: Full Badge Set (Precision · Recall · F1 · Lint)
coverage.pr_help: Enter a PR URL to automatically post the badges and table above as a comment. (Disabled when the n8n backend is not connected)
coverage.invalid_pr_url: Not a valid GitHub PR URL (e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/123)

diff.title: Compare Analysis History
diff.empty: No analysis history. Run "Analyze" at least twice and try again.

graph.title: Lineage Graph
graph.empty: No analysis result — please run Lineage analysis first.
graph.mermaid_help_html: Paste the code below into a GitHub PR comment or a ```mermaid block in your README and it renders automatically.
graph.mermaid_copied: Mermaid code copied (paste into a GitHub PR comment to render automatically)
